name: small law firm accountants processing 5–15 invoices/month tool
description: For small law firm accountants processing 5–15 invoices/month, inefficient billing compilation causes cash flow gaps. We automate invoice drafting instead of manual compilation in spreadsheets.
target_audience: small law firm accountants processing 5–15 invoices/month
problem_solved: inefficient compilation of billing time entries into invoices

locked_fields.primary_user: small law firm accountants processing 5–15 invoices/month
locked_fields.primary_problem: inefficient compilation of billing time entries into invoices
locked_fields.mvp_wedge: For small law firm accountants processing 5–15 invoices/month, inefficient billing compilation causes cash flow gaps. We automate invoice drafting instead of manual compilation in spreadsheets.
locked_fields.current_alternative: manual compilation of billing entries in spreadsheets
